name: Bremenfest Park
description: Bremenfest Park is a place to play pickleball in New Bremen, OH. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Four Seasons Recreational Park
description: Four Seasons Recreational Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Minster, OH. There are 8 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Grand Lake Health/Premier Health South YMCA
description: Grand Lake Health/Premier Health South YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Minster, OH. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Grand Lake Pickleball
description: Prices vary depending on reservation type.
open_play_schedule: Group play times and private court rental times can be seen on our website at www.grandlakepickleball.com

name: K.C. Geiger Park
description: Come play pickleball at K.C. Geiger Park in St. Marys, OH! There are 7 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Wapak Athletic Club
description: Wapak Athletic Club is a place to play pickleball in Wapakoneta, OH. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water.
